codeReview.summary: The fix correctly addresses the missing font-family on Martyr's .class_s36C by introducing two mechanisms: (1) overriding bodyInherited font-family with the resolved default for sections where the body font was inferred from content nodes rather than set by setHTMLDefaults, and (2) adding the resolved default font to empty structural containers that already have non-trivial styles. The approach is well-targeted with appropriate guards to avoid side effects on sections that don't need this behavior. Martyr diffs dropped from 1 to 0, and Elvis/HG/3B are unchanged. Tests remain at 10 failures (baseline).

issues.description: The htmlText type is matched twice in the type switch (htmlText and *htmlText). Both the value receiver type htmlText and pointer receiver *htmlText are handled identically. This is defensive but potentially redundant — the codebase consistently uses htmlText{} as a value type (not pointer). If htmlText is always a value type, the *htmlText case is dead code. Not a bug, but slightly noisy.

sharedStateObservations.observation: AGENTS.md lists HG diff count as 38 and total as 91, but the handoff for this feature reports HG as 35 and total as 87. The AGENTS.md diff counts are stale — they reference commit dd94a88 which is several commits behind master (4677d42). The actual counts have been improving but AGENTS.md hasn't been updated.

sharedStateObservations.observation: AGENTS.md 'Structural Diffs' section lists 'Martyr .class_s36C: Missing font-family: FreeFontSerif,serif (1 diff)' as item #1. This is now resolved (Martyr diffs = 0). This section should be updated to reflect the fix.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: AGENTS.md section 'Structural Diffs (worth fixing — as of dd94a88, only ~7 remain)' item 1 is now fixed by commit 4677d42

summary: PASS. The fix correctly resolves the last Martyr CSS diff by adding two targeted mechanisms in simplifyStylesFull: bodyInherited font-family override for sections with inferred body fonts, and font-family injection for empty structural containers with non-trivial styles. The implementation is well-guarded with conditions (resolvedDefaultFont != "", != "serif", !fontFamilyAddedByDefaults) to prevent unintended side effects. All verification passed: build succeeds, 10 test failures (baseline), Martyr diff = 0 (confirmed directly), other files unchanged. One minor non-blocking observation about redundant htmlText/*htmlText type switch cases.
